nasb.text: Jabez was more honorable than his brothers, and his mother named him Jabez saying, “Because I bore him with pain.”

esv.text: Jabez was more honorable than his brothers; and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, “Because I bore him in pain.”

cnv.text: 雅比斯在眾兄弟中最受人尊重，他母親給他起名叫雅比斯，意思說：“我生產時十分痛苦。”

ccb.text: 雅比斯比他的众弟兄尊贵，他母亲给他取名叫雅比斯，意思是：“我生他时非常痛苦”。
